title: fhadmin
text:
The idea is to build an admin panel for apps using FastHTML and SQLite. I wanna use fastlite to talk to the database and fhdaisy to style the app. The idea is to have this a standalone app that I can mount into another app.
Please use your tools to change the messages directly when I prompt you to change something.

Setup

from fastcore.net import urlsave


p = mk_previewer(app)

title: fhadmin
text:
Database
For development we’ll use the chinook sqlite database. This cell downloads it in the right place if you don’t have it already downloaded.

url = 'https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database/raw/master/ChinookDatabase/DataSources/Chinook_Sqlite.sqlite'
path = Path('../data/chinook.sqlite')
if not path.exists(): urlsave(url, path)


db = database("../data/chinook.sqlite")

text:
Server

if 'srv' in globals():
    srv.stop()


srv = JupyUvi(app)


Test mounting

from pathlib import Path


test_db_path = ':memory:'


tdb = database(test_db_path)  # in-memory database
tdb.execute("CREATE TABLE items (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, name TEXT, quantity INTEGER)")
tdb.execute("INSERT INTO items (name, quantity) VALUES (?, ?)", ("placeholder", 0))  # needed to make table visible
tdb['items'].insert_all([{"name": f"Item {i}", "quantity": i*10} for i in range(1, 21)])
print(f"Created {test_db_path} with {tdb['items'].count} rows, journal_mode:", tdb.execute("PRAGMA journal_mode").fetchone()[0])

Created /tmp/test.sqlite with 21 rows, journal_mode: wal



test_cfg = AdminConfig(db_path=':memory:', password="admin123")
test_admin = create_admin(test_cfg)

parent = FastHTML()

@parent.get("/foobar")
def home(): return H1("Parent App"), A("Go to Admin", href="/admin/tables")

parent.mount("/admin", test_admin)


if "srv" in globals(): srv.stop()
srv = JupyUvi(parent)

title: fhadmin
text: A lightweight, customizable admin panel for FastHTML applications with SQLite databases.

title: fhadmin
text:
Features

🔐 Simple password authentication
📊 Table browser with card-based overview
🔍 Full-text search across text columns
✏️ Inline cell editing
➕ Create new records via modal
🗑️ Delete records
💻 SQL console for custom queries
⚠️ Dangerous SQL query detection with confirmation prompts
📄 Pagination with smart page buttons
🎨 Beautiful UI with DaisyUI/Tailwind

title: fhadmin
text:
Installation
pip install fhadmin

title: fhadmin
text:
Quick Start
from fasthtml.common import *
from fhadmin.core import AdminConfig, create_admin
from fastlite import database

# Create your main app
app = FastHTML()

# Configure and mount the admin panel
cfg = AdminConfig(db_path="data/mydata.sqlite", password="secret")
admin_app = create_admin(cfg)
app.mount("/admin", admin_app)
Visit /admin/login to access the admin panel.

title: fhadmin
text:
Configuration
The AdminConfig dataclass accepts:









Parameter
Type
Default
Description




db_path
str \| Path
required
Path to SQLite database file


password
str
"admin123"
Admin login password

title: fhadmin
text:
How It Works
fhadmin uses a configuration-based architecture that stores settings in app.state.cfg. Routes read the configuration at request time, making it:

Notebook-friendly — Rerun any route cell without side effects
Easy to debug — Routes are plain functions, no closures
Flexible — Change database or password at runtime if needed

title: fhadmin
text:
Routes



Route
Method
Description




/login
GET/POST
Authentication


/logout
POST
End session


/tables
GET
Table overview cards


/tables/{tbl}
GET
Browse table with search & pagination


/tables/{tbl}/new
GET/POST
Create new record


/tables/{tbl}/{pk}
DELETE
Delete record


/tables/{tbl}/{pk}/edit/{col}
GET/PUT
Inline cell editing


/tables/{tbl}/sql
POST
Execute SQL query


/tables/{tbl}/sql/confirm
POST
Confirm dangerous SQL queries
